epic.title: UI Visual Bugs and UX Polish
epic.description:
This epic addresses several UI visual bugs and UX layout adjustments across the V1 and V2 portals.

### Analysis
- The V2 Dashboard layout does not reflect the user flow. It should be re-ordered to display Subdomain Reservations, Personal Access Tokens, and Active Tunnels in a 2/3 width column.
- The V1 Account and System Settings inputs have jarring white backgrounds in dark mode because they use the deprecated `form-control` class or hardcoded inline styles instead of `input-field`.
- The V2 mobile hamburger menu is invisible in dark mode due to missing text color inheritance.
- The V2 SPA renders a blank white screen when `/api/me` fails with a non-401 error.

### Implementation Plan
1. Modify `ui/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx` to restructure the layout grid into a 2/3 and 1/3 layout containing the respective panels.
2. Replace `form-control` with `input-field` in V1 `dashboard.html` and V2 pages.
3. Add `color: var(--text-main)` to the mobile menu button in `Layout.tsx`.
4. Update the catch block in `Layout.tsx` to route all errors to `/login`.
